name: oh-my-codex-slim
description: Slim OMC-style orchestration workflow for Codex.
author: YanzuoLu

interface.shortDescription: Compact OMC orchestration guidance for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Oh My Codex Slim injects a concise orchestrator directive in Codex Default mode and ships skills plus reusable agent role definitions for a safe, lightweight workflow.
